4.reason: [Using `gets()` is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11. This may cause compilation errors with modern compilers that don't support it.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Using `gets()` is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11. This may cause compilation errors with modern compilers that don't support it.]

78.reason: [Loop condition `i<=strlen(s)` causes out-of-bounds access because valid indices are 0 to strlen(s)-1. Accessing s[strlen(s)] reads the null terminator, and beyond is undefined behavior. Also, this may print garbage or extra characters.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition `i<=strlen(s)` causes out-of-bounds access because valid indices are 0 to strlen(s)-1. Accessing s[strlen(s)] reads the null terminator, and beyond is undefined behavior. Also, this may print garbage or extra characters.]
